---
title: "PROSTOK"
author: "Muhammad Ilham Gustami"
date: "2025-11-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Load libraries
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)

# Load data
file_path <- "Spreadsheet_Antrian Teazzi.xlsx"
df <- read_excel(file_path)

# Fungsi untuk identifikasi dan hapus outlier menggunakan IQR
remove_outliers_iqr <- function(data, column_name) {
  Q1 <- quantile(data[[column_name]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  Q3 <- quantile(data[[column_name]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  IQR <- Q3 - Q1
  lower_bound <- Q1 - 1.5 * IQR
  upper_bound <- Q3 + 1.5 * IQR
  
  # Hapus baris yang mengandung outlier
  data_clean <- data[data[[column_name]] >= lower_bound & data[[column_name]] <= upper_bound, ]
  
  return(list(
    data_clean = data_clean,
    lower_bound = lower_bound,
    upper_bound = upper_bound,
    outliers_removed = nrow(data) - nrow(data_clean)
  ))
}

# Hapus outlier untuk LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN
result_service <- remove_outliers_iqr(df, 'LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)')
df_clean_service <- result_service$data_clean

# Hapus outlier untuk WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN dari data yang sudah dibersihkan sebelumnya
result_arrival <- remove_outliers_iqr(df_clean_service, 'WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)')
df_final_clean <- result_arrival$data_clean

cat("=== INFORMASI PEMBERSIHAN OUTLIER ===\n")
cat("Data awal:", nrow(df), "baris\n")
cat("Outlier LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN yang dihapus:", result_service$outliers_removed, "baris\n")
cat("Outlier WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN yang dihapus:", result_arrival$outliers_removed, "baris\n")
cat("Data akhir setelah cleaning:", nrow(df_final_clean), "baris\n")
cat("Total baris yang dihapus:", nrow(df) - nrow(df_final_clean), "baris\n")

# Data bersih untuk plotting
service_time_clean <- df_final_clean$`LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)`
arrival_interval_clean <- df_final_clean$`WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)`

# Hitung density untuk menentukan posisi teks
density_service <- density(service_time_clean)
density_arrival <- density(arrival_interval_clean)

# PLOT 1: LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN - Setelah Cleaning
p1_service <- ggplot(data = df_final_clean, aes(x = `LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), 
                 bins = 20, 
                 fill = "lightblue", 
                 color = "black", 
                 alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_function(fun = dnorm, 
                args = list(mean = mean(service_time_clean), sd = sd(service_time_clean)),
                color = "red", size = 1.2, linetype = "solid") +
  labs(title = "Histogram LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN\n(Setelah Cleaning)",
       x = "LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN (detik)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(service_time_clean) * 0.6, 
           y = max(density_service$y) * 0.8,
           label = paste("Mean =", round(mean(service_time_clean), 2), "\n",
                        "Std. Dev =", round(sd(service_time_clean), 2)),
           size = 4, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold")

print(p1_service)

# PLOT 2: WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN - Setelah Cleaning
p1_arrival <- ggplot(data = df_final_clean, aes(x = `WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)`)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = ..density..), 
                 bins = 20, 
                 fill = "lightgreen", 
                 color = "black", 
                 alpha = 0.8) +
  stat_function(fun = dnorm, 
                args = list(mean = mean(arrival_interval_clean), sd = sd(arrival_interval_clean)),
                color = "red", size = 1.2, linetype = "solid") +
  labs(title = "Histogram WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN\n(Setelah Cleaning)",
       x = "WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN (detik)", y = "Density") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
  ) +
  annotate("text", 
           x = max(arrival_interval_clean) * 0.6, 
           y = max(density_arrival$y) * 0.8,
           label = paste("Mean =", round(mean(arrival_interval_clean), 2), "\n",
                        "Std. Dev =", round(sd(arrival_interval_clean), 2)),
           size = 4, hjust = 0, fontface = "bold")

print(p1_arrival)

# PLOT 3: Perbandingan Sebelum vs Sesudah - LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN
p2_service <- ggplot() +
  geom_histogram(data = df, aes(x = `LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)`, y = ..density.., fill = "Sebelum"), 
                 bins = 25, alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  geom_histogram(data = df_final_clean, aes(x = `LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)`, y = ..density.., fill = "Sesudah"), 
                 bins = 25, alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Perbandingan Distribusi LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN\n(Sebelum vs Sesudah Cleaning)",
       x = "LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN (detik)", y = "Density") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sebelum" = "red", "Sesudah" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12))

# PLOT 4: Perbandingan Sebelum vs Sesudah - WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN
p2_arrival <- ggplot() +
  geom_histogram(data = df, aes(x = `WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)`, y = ..density.., fill = "Sebelum"), 
                 bins = 25, alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  geom_histogram(data = df_final_clean, aes(x = `WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)`, y = ..density.., fill = "Sesudah"), 
                 bins = 25, alpha = 0.6, color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Perbandingan Distribusi WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN\n(Sebelum vs Sesudah Cleaning)",
       x = "WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN (detik)", y = "Density") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sebelum" = "red", "Sesudah" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12))

# BAR CHART: Perbandingan Statistik
stats_comparison <- data.frame(
  Variabel = rep(c("LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN", "WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN"), each = 2),
  Kondisi = rep(c("Sebelum", "Sesudah"), 2),
  Mean = c(
    mean(df$`LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(service_time_clean, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(df$`WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(arrival_interval_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
  ),
  Std_Dev = c(
    sd(df$`LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN(DETIK)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(service_time_clean, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(df$`WAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN(DETIK)`, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd(arrival_interval_clean, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)

# Bar chart untuk Mean
p3_mean <- ggplot(stats_comparison, aes(x = Variabel, y = Mean, fill = Kondisi)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Perbandingan Mean Sebelum dan Sesudah Cleaning",
       x = "", y = "Mean (detik)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sebelum" = "red", "Sesudah" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12))

# Bar chart untuk Std Dev
p3_std <- ggplot(stats_comparison, aes(x = Variabel, y = Std_Dev, fill = Kondisi)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge", alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Perbandingan Standard Deviation Sebelum dan Sesudah Cleaning",
       x = "", y = "Standard Deviation (detik)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Sebelum" = "red", "Sesudah" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12))

# Tampilkan semua plot
grid.arrange(p1_service, p1_arrival, p2_service, p2_arrival, p3_mean, p3_std, 
             ncol = 2, nrow = 3)

# Tampilkan statistik
cat("\n=== STATISTIK SETELAH CLEANING ===\n")
cat("LAMA WAKTU PELAYANAN:\n")
cat("  Mean:", round(mean(service_time_clean), 2), "\n")
cat("  Std. Dev:", round(sd(service_time_clean), 2), "\n")
cat("  Min:", round(min(service_time_clean), 2), "\n")
cat("  Max:", round(max(service_time_clean), 2), "\n")

cat("\nWAKTU ANTAR KEDATANGAN:\n")
cat("  Mean:", round(mean(arrival_interval_clean), 2), "\n")
cat("  Std. Dev:", round(sd(arrival_interval_clean), 2),
```


```{r}
